residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 286-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: UniProt P62593 BLAT_ECOLX active-site and substrate-binding features plus manual motif-neighborhood windows.
evidence: UniProt P62593 annotates active sites at target positions 68, 71, 128, and 164, and substrate binding at 232-234. The active_site_neighborhood group is a transparent +/-2 residue window around those UniProt-supported feature positions. The structure_ligand_contact_5a group is derived from heavy-atom contacts within 5.0 Angstrom of the CB4 inhibitor in PDB 1M40 chain A, using a -2 residue-number offset from PDB to ProteinGym/UniProt target numbering.
